meta.name: candidate_profile
meta.purpose: Canonical candidate profile for the Job Search OS MVP. Use confirmed facts first. Keep unresolved items visible rather than silently normalizing them away.

primaryTitles: Sales Operations Analyst / Sales Ops Analyst
secondaryTitles: Customer Onboarding / Customer Success Operations-type roles
includeRules: Prioritize operations roles with customer coordination and process ownership.
Prioritize remote roles or hybrid roles within roughly 20-25 minutes of Canton, Ohio.
Prioritize stable base-compensation roles with benefits.
Favor roles emphasizing documentation, process design, CRM/workflow ownership, onboarding, reporting, or cross-functional execution.
excludeRules: Deprioritize roles with unstable compensation structures.
Deprioritize roles incompatible with football coaching commitments.
Deprioritize roles that replicate unclear scope, founder-chaos, or heavy micromanagement patterns.
targetIndustries: Service operations / home services / field-service businesses

workPreferences.geographicConstraint: remote preferred or hybrid within roughly 20-25 minutes of Canton, Ohio
workPreferences.scheduleConstraintSummary: Role must be compatible with football coaching commitments.
scheduleConstraintDetails: Summer coaching availability constraint around mornings / midday — strong inference, exact employer-facing language still needs verification.
Fall coaching availability constraint around late afternoon — strong inference, exact employer-facing language still needs verification.
avoidEmployerTraits: heavy travel or hours that damage life fit

roleHistory.title: Operations & Revenue Growth Manager
responsibilities: Managed customer onboarding and ongoing communication from initial contact through service completion.
Coordinated scheduling, job timelines, and service execution across sales, operations, and field crews.
Maintained and adjusted CRM workflows to track leads, active jobs, follow-ups, and customer service history.
Worked with ownership to refine sales and operational processes in a founder-led, low-infrastructure service environment.
Served as a primary point of contact for active customers during projects.
Handled commercial account communication and bid support while coordinating operational limits and field execution realities.
Supported marketing and sales efforts through reporting, documentation, internal coordination, and campaign planning across pressure washing and holiday lighting service lines.
Operated across residential and commercial revenue activity in a role spanning sales, marketing, operations liaison work, KPI reporting, and documentation.
achievements: Built or refined CRM/process infrastructure, marketing calendars, proposals, follow-up logic, and documentation systems within a founder-led service environment.
Created reusable systems language around handoffs, process clarity, scheduling coordination, and customer communication.
Supported proposal and account work across both residential and commercial activity, including named commercial accounts such as Wallick Communities, Morton's Steakhouse, and Sahara Apartments.
notes: Master displayed title is normalized to 'Operations & Revenue Growth Manager' with 'Growth & Sales Manager' preserved as an alias.
Updated APW metrics bank now supports ResponsiBid, Constant Contact, PandaDoc, Canva, and Airtable as used tools.
Title/date normalization remains the main open verification issue for this role.

roleHistory.title: Sales And Marketing Specialist
responsibilities: Supported sales and business development through prospecting, estimating, and direct client communication.
Prepared and presented bids and contracts.
Coordinated between clients, crews, and management.
Assisted with scheduling, invoicing, documentation, and basic project tracking.
Operated heavy equipment on active job sites as needed.
achievements: Balanced sales responsibilities with field and coordination work, strengthening practical understanding of construction workflows.

roleHistory.title: Industrial Maintenance Technician
responsibilities: Diagnosed, evaluated, and repaired industrial manufacturing equipment.
Worked on CNC horizontal and vertical lathes, mills, and both reciprocating and rotary grinders.
Communicated with machinists, supervisors, and outside contractors on maintenance needs and plant projects.
Supported equipment uptime and safe operations through preventative and corrective maintenance.
Troubleshot issues under time pressure and production constraints.
achievements: Built strong operational discipline, troubleshooting capability, and credibility in high-pressure production environments.

confirmedSkills: CRM workflow design / follow-up process organization
KPI framework design / call-log tracking / accountability reporting
Seasonal campaign and promotional offer design
Visual sales enablement / client rendering workflows
valuePropositionThemes: Cross-functional operator who bridges sales, customer communication, office workflows, and field execution
System builder who turns ambiguous work into structured, repeatable processes
Operations-minded communicator who reduces handoff friction and clarifies expectations
Practical, field-informed professional who understands operational reality, not just theory
differentiators: Rare mix of field-service credibility, customer-facing coordination, and systems/process design
Demonstrated habit of building reusable documentation, frameworks, SOPs, and KPI structures
Strong ambiguity-reduction language already exists and can be reused immediately
Coaching mindset reinforces accountability, development, and structured execution

achievementHighlights.achievement: Designed and documented end-to-end revenue execution systems for time-bound promotions, including named campaign concepts such as Cookie Week and a Crumbl gift-card incentive offer, covering promotion design, lead flow, proposal creation, deposit collection, scheduling, and fulfillment controls.
achievementHighlights.metricValue: Leadership-ready promotional SOPs and campaign structure; stronger ownership clarity and booking/deposit process predictability.

achievementHighlights.achievement: Built structured KPI and tracking systems in Airtable to monitor call activity, list quality, follow-up discipline, and accountability rather than relying on ad hoc outreach.
achievementHighlights.metricValue: Implementation-ready KPI framework and structured tracking system.

achievementHighlights.achievement: Created client-facing holiday-lighting visual workflows tied to quoting and install logic, using renderings and mock-ups to improve sales clarity and execution alignment.
achievementHighlights.category: Visual Sales Enablement / Proposal Support / Process Design
achievementHighlights.metricValue: Approval-ready visual workflow aligned to quoting and install decisions; reduced revision-cycle ambiguity.

achievementHighlights.achievement: Designed a followership seminar that translated academic leadership theory into a practical field-training framework.
achievementHighlights.metricValue: Structured 60-minute training asset ready for academic submission and internal use.

achievementHighlights.achievement: Managed customer onboarding and coordination from initial contact through service completion while maintaining CRM visibility and reducing handoff issues.
Prepared bids and contracts while coordinating customers, crews, and operational limits in a construction environment.
achievementHighlights.metricValue: Direct support of sales and project execution.

achievementHighlights.achievement: Troubleshot and repaired industrial machinery in a high-volume production environment under time and uptime pressure.

summaryFragments: I work at the intersection of customer experience and operations, helping teams deliver consistent, well-coordinated outcomes.
My focus is on customer onboarding, CRM organization, and process improvement.
I’m especially interested in building clear workflows that reduce handoff friction, improve visibility, and make it easier for teams to execute reliably.
My background in construction coordination and industrial maintenance shaped a practical mindset.
strongPhrases: make it easier for teams to execute reliably

openNormalizationRisks: APW end date must not be treated as day-accurate until verified.
APW displayed title must be locked with one master title plus optional alias strategy.
Target lane order is directionally strong but not fully finalized.
Hard metrics remain a major credibility gap.
